Interface ITemporalFeature

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to properties specifying the temporal feature type.

[Guid("A677AB62-2FB8-11D5-B7E2-00010265ADC5")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITemporalFeature : IFeature, IObject, IRow, IRowBuffer

TemporalFeatureType

Specifies the type of feature used in a temporal workspace.
